title: RELAY spec version
description: The crate must implement RELAY specification version 1.6

title: Zone string representation
description: Each zone must have a unique non-empty PascalCase string name

title: Zone inner value
description: Zone is a newtype over u8; inner value is stable across versions

title: FRONT_LEFT is 1
description: Zone::FRONT_LEFT.0 == 1

title: FRONT_RIGHT is 2
description: Zone::FRONT_RIGHT.0 == 2

title: REAR_LEFT is 3
description: Zone::REAR_LEFT.0 == 3

title: REAR_RIGHT is 4
description: Zone::REAR_RIGHT.0 == 4

title: CENTRAL is 5
description: Zone::CENTRAL.0 == 5

title: Zone constants are distinct
description: All zone constants must have distinct inner values

title: NORMAL priority
description: Priority::NORMAL.0 == 0

title: HIGH > NORMAL
description: Priority::HIGH > Priority::NORMAL

title: CRITICAL > HIGH
description: Priority::CRITICAL > Priority::HIGH

title: NOOP is 0
description: CommandType::NOOP.0 == 0

title: SET is 1
description: CommandType::SET.0 == 1

title: GET is 2
description: CommandType::GET.0 == 2

title: RESET is 3
description: CommandType::RESET.0 == 3

title: WATCHDOG is 4
description: CommandType::WATCHDOG.0 == 4

title: Command types distinct
description: All command type constants must have distinct inner values

title: ResponseStatus strings unique
description: All response status values must have unique non-empty string representations

title: OK is 0
description: ResponseStatus::OK.0 == 0

title: ERROR is 1
description: ResponseStatus::ERROR.0 == 1

title: TIMEOUT is 2
description: ResponseStatus::TIMEOUT.0 == 2

title: BUSY is 3
description: ResponseStatus::BUSY.0 == 3

title: Status constants distinct
description: All response status constants must have distinct inner values

title: Zero Command is safe NOOP
description: Command::default() must have zone=UNKNOWN, cmd_type=NOOP, priority=NORMAL, payload=None

title: Command payload optional
description: Command.payload may be None

title: Response carries command ID
description: Response.command_id echoes the dispatched command ID

title: Response carries zone
description: Response.zone identifies the responding zone

title: Zero Response has status OK
description: Response::default().status == ResponseStatus::OK

title: Status carries zone
description: Status.zone identifies the publishing zone controller

title: Status carries seq
description: Status.seq is a monotonically increasing sequence number

title: Status healthy flag
description: Status.healthy reports whether the controller is operational

title: Status seq per controller
description: Each zone controller maintains its own seq counter

title: Status payload optional
description: Status.payload may be None

title: Closed error distinct
description: RcpError::Closed must be a distinct variant

title: NotFound error distinct
description: RcpError::NotFound must be a distinct variant

title: AlreadyExists error distinct
description: RcpError::AlreadyExists must be a distinct variant

title: Timeout error distinct
description: RcpError::Timeout must be a distinct variant

title: Busy error distinct
description: RcpError::Busy must be a distinct variant

title: Sentinel errors are mutually distinct
description: All RELAY sentinel error variants must be pairwise distinct

title: Closed is relay-closed
description: RcpError::Closed.is_relay_closed() == true

title: NotConnected is relay-not-connected
description: RcpError::NotConnected.is_relay_not_connected() == true

title: AlreadyExists is standalone
description: RcpError::AlreadyExists.is_already_exists() == true and is not relay-closed/timeout/not-connected

title: Timeout is relay-timeout
description: RcpError::Timeout.is_relay_timeout() == true

title: ZoneMismatch is distinct
description: RcpError::ZoneMismatch.is_zone_mismatch() == true and is also is_relay_not_connected()

title: NotConnected test
description: Direct test of NotConnected is_relay_not_connected

title: PayloadTooLarge test
description: Direct test of PayloadTooLarge is_relay_payload_too_large

title: Only Closed is relay-closed
description: is_relay_closed() returns false for non-Closed variants

title: is_relay_not_connected coverage
description: is_relay_not_connected returns false for Closed and Timeout

title: Timeout is relay-timeout
description: RcpError::Timeout.is_relay_timeout() == true

title: PayloadTooLarge not relay-closed
description: PayloadTooLarge.is_relay_closed() == false

title: ZoneMismatch is relay-not-connected
description: ZoneMismatch wraps NotConnected per RELAY spec

title: AlreadyExists is not relay-timeout
description: AlreadyExists.is_relay_timeout() == false

title: Busy is relay-timeout
description: Busy.is_relay_timeout() == true; Busy wraps Timeout

title: ZoneMismatch is relay-not-connected (named)
description: ZoneMismatch.is_relay_not_connected() == true

title: zone_from_str PascalCase and kebab-case
description: zone_from_str accepts both PascalCase and kebab-case zone names

title: zone_from_str unknown returns NotFound
description: zone_from_str returns Err(RcpError::NotFound) for unknown strings

title: SLEEP and WAKE command types distinct
description: CommandType::SLEEP != CommandType::WAKE; both differ from other command types

title: PowerState variants distinct
description: PowerState::Active, Sleep, Standby are pairwise distinct

title: Initial state is Active
description: PowerStateController starts in Active state

title: power_state query
description: PowerStateController.power_state() returns current state

title: SLEEP transitions to Sleep
description: Sending SLEEP command transitions to PowerState::Sleep

title: Commands during Sleep return BUSY
description: Non-WAKE commands while in Sleep state return ResponseStatus::BUSY

title: WAKE transitions to Active
description: Sending WAKE command from Sleep transitions to PowerState::Active

title: Close returns Closed
description: PowerStateController.send() after close() returns Err(Closed)

title: Controller is a trait
description: Controller is a trait with zone/send/subscribe/close methods

title: send invokes handler
description: MockController.send() invokes the registered handler and returns its result

title: send returns Result
description: Controller.send() returns Result<Response, RcpError>

title: subscribe returns Subscription
description: Controller.subscribe() returns Result<Subscription, RcpError>

title: close safe to call multiple times
description: Controller.close() must be idempotent

title: send after close returns Closed
description: Controller.send() after close() returns Err(RcpError::Closed)

title: zero timeout returns Timeout
description: send() with timeout=Some(Duration::ZERO) returns Err(RcpError::Timeout)

title: zone mismatch returns ZoneMismatch
description: send() with cmd.zone != ctrl.zone() returns Err(RcpError::ZoneMismatch)

title: zone getter stable
description: Controller.zone() returns the same value across calls

title: subscribe seq strictly increasing
description: Each published Status carries a seq number strictly greater than the previous

title: subscribe on closed returns Closed
description: subscribe() after close() returns Err(Closed)

title: multiple concurrent subscribers
description: Multiple concurrent subscribers each receive their own copy of published Status

title: NOOP command accepted
description: Controller accepts NOOP command type without error

title: WATCHDOG command accepted
description: Controller accepts WATCHDOG command type without error

title: RESET command accepted
description: Controller accepts RESET command type without error

title: handler response returned verbatim
description: The Response returned by the handler is returned unchanged from send()

title: publish on closed controller is safe
description: Calling publish() on a closed controller must not panic

title: concurrent sends are race-free
description: Multiple concurrent send() calls from different threads are safe

title: concurrent publish and subscribe are race-free
description: Simultaneous publish() and subscribe() from different threads are safe

title: status carries correct zone
description: Published Status.zone matches the controller's zone

title: status carries correct payload
description: Published Status.payload matches the payload passed to publish()

title: status healthy while open
description: Status.healthy == true while the controller is open

title: zero timeout is pre-cancelled
description: Timeout=Some(ZERO) is treated as pre-cancelled context (no handler invoked)

title: nil payload does not panic
description: send() with payload=None must not panic

title: Controller is Send+Sync
description: Controller implementations must be Send + Sync

title: Payload copied before handler
description: MockController copies payload before passing to handler

title: Publish copies payload
description: MockController.publish() copies the payload for each subscriber

title: Registry is a trait
description: Registry is a trait with register/deregister/lookup/controllers/close

title: register returns AlreadyExists on duplicate
description: Registering the same zone twice returns Err(AlreadyExists)

title: deregister returns NotFound for absent zone
description: Deregistering an unregistered zone returns Err(NotFound)

title: lookup returns NotFound for absent zone
description: Looking up an unregistered zone returns Err(NotFound)

title: lookup returns Closed when registry is closed
description: lookup() after registry.close() returns Err(Closed)

title: controllers returns all registered
description: controllers() returns one entry per registered zone

title: close closes all controllers
description: registry.close() propagates close to all registered controllers

title: Registry is Send+Sync
description: Registry implementations must be Send + Sync

title: deregister closes the controller
description: deregister() calls close() on the removed controller

title: MockRegistry pre-populates 5 zones
description: MockRegistry.new() registers controllers for all 5 standard zones

title: register after close returns Closed
description: registry.register() after registry.close() returns Err(Closed)

title: deregister after close returns Closed
description: registry.deregister() after registry.close() returns Err(Closed)

title: close is idempotent
description: Calling registry.close() multiple times is safe

title: Magic bytes
description: Wire frames start with 0x52 0x43

title: Protocol version byte
description: Wire frames include PROTO_VER=0x01 at byte offset 2

title: Message type byte
description: Wire frame includes message type byte (Command=0x01, Response=0x02, Status=0x03)

title: Header length
description: Wire header is exactly 16 bytes

title: Command encode/decode round-trip
description: encode_command(cmd) followed by decode_command() recovers the original command

title: Response encode/decode round-trip
description: encode_response(resp) followed by decode_response() recovers the original response

title: Payload size limit
description: Payloads exceeding MAX_PAYLOAD=65491 bytes are rejected with PayloadTooLarge

title: Bad magic rejected
description: Frames with wrong magic bytes return Err(BadMagic)

title: Bad version rejected
description: Frames with wrong protocol version return Err(BadVersion)

title: E2E wrap prepends seqNum
description: wrap() prepends a 4-byte big-endian sequence number

title: CRC covers seqNum and payload
description: CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE is computed over [seqNum bytes ++ payload]

title: CRC mismatch rejected
description: unwrap() returns Err(CrcMismatch) when CRC does not match

title: E2eController auto-increments seq
description: E2eController atomically increments sequence number per send

title: ReplayGuard rejects replayed seq
description: ReplayGuard.check() returns Err(Replay) for previously seen seq numbers

title: E2E header is 6 bytes
description: E2E header length is 4 (seqNum) + 2 (CRC) = 6 bytes

title: wrap/unwrap are inverse
description: unwrap(wrap(seq, payload)) == Ok((seq, payload))

title: Single-bit corruption detected
description: Flipping any bit in payload or seqNum causes CRC mismatch

title: PrioController wraps inner
description: PrioController delegates commands to an inner Controller

title: Dispatch thread spawned on new
description: PrioController.new() spawns a dispatch thread immediately

title: Zone matches inner
description: PrioController.zone() returns the inner controller's zone

title: Critical dispatched before High/Normal
description: Critical-priority commands are dequeued before High and Normal

title: FIFO within priority level
description: Commands at the same priority level are dispatched in submission order

title: Payload forwarded unchanged
description: PrioController forwards payloads to inner without modification

title: All command types routed
description: PrioController handles all CommandType variants

title: Close drains queue with Closed error
description: close() returns Err(Closed) to all pending callers

title: Token bucket burst capacity
description: Commands up to burst capacity succeed without delay

title: Default config values
description: DefaultConfig() returns rate=100, burst=20, exempt_critical=true

title: Zone matches inner
description: RateLimitController.zone() returns inner controller's zone

title: Tokens replenish over time
description: Token bucket refills at rate tokens/second

title: Normal and High obey bucket
description: NORMAL and HIGH priority commands consume tokens from the bucket

title: Empty bucket returns Busy
description: When bucket is empty, send() returns Err(RcpError::Busy) immediately

title: Critical exempt from rate limit
description: When exempt_critical=true, CRITICAL commands bypass the token bucket

title: Busy is relay-timeout sentinel
description: RcpError::Busy.is_relay_timeout() == true (Busy wraps Timeout)

title: SimController accepts commands
description: SimController processes commands and returns responses

title: Queued responses delivered in order
description: queue_response() pre-programs responses consumed FIFO

title: Commands recorded
description: SimController records all dispatched commands for inspection

title: Zero timeout returns Timeout
description: send() with timeout=Some(ZERO) returns Err(Timeout)

title: Zone mismatch returns ZoneMismatch
description: send() with wrong zone returns Err(ZoneMismatch)

title: subscribe receives publish
description: Subscription receives Status updates from publish()

title: Publish increments seq
description: Each publish() call increments the seq counter

title: Close returns Closed
description: send() after close() returns Err(Closed)

title: Watchdog default config
description: WatchdogConfig::default() returns interval=1s, miss_window=3, close_on_miss=false

title: Closed controller accumulates misses
description: WatchdogMonitor accumulates miss_count when controller is unresponsive

title: Background thread starts on new
description: WatchdogMonitor::start() spawns a background thread immediately

title: Healthy when responsive
description: is_healthy() returns true when controller responds to WATCHDOG commands

title: Miss count is zero on responsive controller
description: miss_count() returns 0 when controller is responsive

title: stop terminates monitor
description: stop() terminates the watchdog thread without deadlock

title: Zone getter
description: WatchdogMonitor.zone() returns the monitored zone

title: Unhealthy after miss window exceeded
description: is_healthy() returns false after miss_window consecutive misses

title: DeadlineController enforces latency
description: DeadlineController sends with a maximum response deadline

title: Deadline getter
description: DeadlineController.deadline() returns configured deadline

title: Commands forwarded to inner
description: DeadlineController forwards commands to inner controller

title: Zero timeout returns Timeout
description: send() with timeout=Some(ZERO) returns Err(Timeout)

title: Shorter of deadline and caller timeout wins
description: Effective timeout = min(caller_timeout, deadline)

title: Close forwarded
description: DeadlineController.close() is forwarded to inner

title: LoanPool pre-allocates buffers
description: LoanPool.new(count, size) pre-allocates count buffers of size bytes

title: Correct pool count
description: LoanPool.available() returns count immediately after creation

title: Buffer returned on drop
description: Dropping a Loan returns the buffer to the pool

title: try_acquire returns None when empty
description: try_acquire() returns None when no buffers are available

title: Zone matches inner
description: LoanPoolController.zone() returns inner controller's zone

title: Oversized loan request rejected
description: loan(size > buffer_size) returns Err(PayloadTooLarge)

title: send_loaned forwards payload
description: send_loaned() copies loan payload into command and forwards to inner

title: ZoneGroup wraps multiple controllers
description: ZoneGroup holds a Vec of zone controllers

title: Zone is logical zone ID
description: ZoneGroup.zone() returns the logical group zone, not a member zone

title: Send broadcasts to all members
description: send() dispatches the command to every member controller

title: First member error propagated
description: If any member returns an error, send() returns that error

title: Subscribe via first member
description: subscribe() delegates to the first member controller

title: Close closes all members
description: close() closes all member controllers

title: Empty group send returns default OK
description: send() on an empty group returns Ok(Response::default())

title: ProxyController wraps inner
description: ProxyController forwards all calls to an interchangeable inner controller

title: Zone set from original inner
description: ProxyController.zone() is set from the original inner controller at construction

title: send forwarded
description: ProxyController.send() forwards to the current inner controller

title: subscribe forwarded
description: ProxyController.subscribe() forwards to the current inner controller

title: swap replaces inner atomically
description: swap() atomically replaces the inner controller

title: detach returns NotConnected
description: After detach(), send() and subscribe() return Err(NotConnected)

title: RedundancyController provides hot standby
description: RedundancyController implements 1-of-2 hot standby

title: Zone matches primary
description: RedundancyController.zone() matches the primary controller's zone

title: Primary success no failover
description: When primary succeeds, no failover is triggered

title: Primary failure triggers failover
description: On primary error, secondary is promoted and command is retried

title: Both failed returns error
description: When both primary and secondary fail, the error is returned to caller

title: Failover count increments
description: failover_count() increments each time a failover occurs

title: No secondary after failover
description: After one failover, has_secondary() returns false

title: subscribe forwarded to primary
description: subscribe() delegates to the current primary

title: FaultSpec defines rule and error
description: FaultSpec holds a FaultRule and the error to inject

title: FaultRule variants
description: FaultRule supports Always, OnNthCall, and AfterNthCall

title: No fault passes through
description: Without fault rules, commands are forwarded to inner unchanged

title: Multiple rules first match wins
description: When multiple rules match, the first one installed takes effect

title: Clear removes all rules
description: clear() removes all installed fault rules

title: Fault rule checked on each send
description: Each send() call evaluates all installed fault rules in order

title: Close forwarded
description: FaultInjectController.close() is forwarded to inner

title: Metrics struct
description: ObserveController maintains Metrics with call count, error count, latency

title: ObserveController wraps inner
description: ObserveController wraps an inner controller

title: Metrics updated on each send
description: call count and error count are updated on every send()

title: Hook registered via add_hook
description: add_hook() registers a callback invoked after each send()

title: Hook receives command, result, and latency
description: Hook function receives (&Command, &Result, Duration)

title: Close forwarded
description: ObserveController.close() forwards to inner

title: TrafficClass type
description: TrafficClass is a newtype over u8 with BEST_EFFORT(0), CONTROL(5), CRITICAL(7)

title: Priority to traffic class mapping
description: TrafficClass::from_priority() maps NORMAL→BEST_EFFORT, HIGH→CONTROL, CRITICAL→CRITICAL

title: Zone forwarded
description: TsnController.zone() returns the inner controller's zone

title: TSN byte prepended to payload
description: TsnController prepends traffic class byte to command payload

title: Close forwarded
description: TsnController.close() forwards to inner

title: Policy defines allowed cmd types
description: Policy.allowed_cmd_types controls which command types are permitted

title: allow_all permits any command
description: Policy::allow_all() permits all command types

title: deny_all blocks every command
description: Policy::deny_all() blocks all command types

title: AuthzController wraps inner
description: AuthzController wraps an inner controller with a policy

title: Policy enforced on send
description: send() returns Err(NotFound) when command type is not in allowlist

title: Policy hot-swappable
description: set_policy() atomically replaces the active policy

title: Close forwarded
description: AuthzController.close() forwards to inner

title: MAX_CHUNK constant
description: MAX_CHUNK == 512 bytes per firmware chunk

title: Empty image rejected
description: flash() with empty image returns Err(InvalidSize)

title: Single chunk flash
description: flash() with image <= chunk_size sends exactly one chunk

title: Multiple chunks
description: flash() sends ceil(image_len/chunk_size) SET commands

title: Chunk error aborts
description: Non-OK response from any chunk aborts flash and returns error

title: Chunk size capped at MAX_CHUNK
description: Chunk sizes larger than MAX_CHUNK are silently capped

title: Entry carries timestamp
description: Record Entry includes SystemTime timestamp

title: RecordController wraps inner
description: RecordController wraps an inner controller and logs interactions

title: Entries in chronological order
description: entries() returns interactions in submission order

title: Clear empties log
description: clear() removes all recorded entries

title: Errors recorded
description: RecordController records both successful and error results

title: FederationRouter routes by vehicle ID
description: FederationRouter maps vehicle IDs to remote registries

title: add_peer registers a remote registry
description: add_peer() registers a registry under a vehicle ID string

title: remove_peer deregisters
description: remove_peer() removes a registered vehicle registry

title: peer_ids lists all
description: peer_ids() returns all registered vehicle ID strings

title: lookup_peer resolves zone
description: lookup_peer(vehicle_id, zone) returns the controller from the peer registry

title: DynStore is a thread-safe KV store
description: DynStore provides a thread-safe key/value store

title: set inserts or replaces
description: set() inserts a new key or replaces an existing value

title: get returns value or None
description: get() returns Some(value) for existing keys, None otherwise

title: delete removes key
description: delete() removes a key; returns true if it existed

title: keys lists all
description: keys() returns all parameter names currently in the store

title: RcpConfig default is valid
description: RcpConfig::default() passes validate()

title: ControllerConfig per-controller
description: ControllerConfig holds zone, timeout_ms, max_payload_bytes

title: WatchdogConfig defaults
description: WatchdogConfig::default() returns interval_ms=1000, window=3

title: RateLimitConfig defaults
description: RateLimitConfig::default() returns rate=100, burst=20, exempt_critical=true

title: JSON and YAML parsing
description: from_json() and from_yaml() parse RcpConfig from text

title: Validation rejects invalid values
description: validate() returns Err for zone > 5, negative rate, zero watchdog window, oversized payload

title: FieldType maps to Rust types
description: FieldType::rust_type() returns correct Rust primitive type names

title: StructSchema defines name and fields
description: StructSchema holds name and Vec<Field> with optional flag

title: generate_structs emits Rust code
description: generate_structs() emits valid Rust struct definitions

title: parse_schema converts JSON schema
description: parse_schema() converts a HashMap schema definition into StructSchemas

title: Feasibility variants
description: Feasibility has Low, Medium, High, Critical variants with Display

title: Impact variants
description: Impact has Negligible, Moderate, Major, Severe variants with Display

title: RiskLevel variants
description: RiskLevel has Low, Medium, High, Critical variants

title: risk_level function
description: risk_level(f, i) returns RiskLevel per ISO 21434 Table 14

title: Threat.risk_level()
description: Threat.risk_level() computes risk from its feasibility and impact

title: filter_by_risk
description: filter_by_risk() returns threats at or above the minimum risk level

title: GapReport has_gaps flag
description: GapReport.has_gaps() returns true when any gap list is non-empty

title: analyse detects gaps
description: analyse() identifies unimplemented, untested, and undeclared requirements

title: coverage ratio
description: coverage() returns ratio of covered to declared requirements

title: coverage_by_prefix
description: coverage_by_prefix() groups coverage statistics by requirement prefix

title: zero coverage baseline
description: coverage() returns 0.0 when no requirements are covered; coverage_by_prefix() returns 0.0 per prefix

description: Invariant holds a name and a checkable predicate

description: CheckResult records passed and failed invariant names

description: uptime() returns non-negative duration since construction

description: shutdown() closes the registry and sets is_shutting_down()

description: CanSocket defines send_frame and recv_frame

description: SomeIpSocket defines send and recv

description: CCommand uses #[repr(C)] with C-compatible field types

title: CResponse is repr(C)
description: CResponse uses #[repr(C)] with C-compatible field types

title: Command/CCommand conversion
description: From<&Command> for CCommand and From<&CCommand> for Command are inverses

title: CError maps RcpError
description: From<&RcpError> for CError maps all RcpError variants to CError codes

title: Adapter trait
description: Adapter<M> defines to_command and to_message

title: AdaptController wraps inner
description: AdaptController delegates sends via Adapter conversion

title: send_msg uses adapter
description: send_msg() converts M to Command, sends, and converts Response back to M

title: PassthroughAdapter identity
description: PassthroughAdapter for Command implements identity conversion

title: Payload preserved
description: PassthroughAdapter preserves payload through round-trip

title: send command
description: rcp send dispatches a command to a zone controller

title: send options
description: rcp send accepts --zone, --type, --priority, --payload flags

title: version command
description: rcp version prints crate version and RELAY spec version

title: zones command
description: rcp zones lists all standard zone IDs and names

title: status command
description: rcp status subscribes to a zone and prints the first Status

title: version --format json
description: The CLI must emit a valid §12.1 JSON document when invoked with version --format json containing tool, version, spec_version, language, runtime fields

title: capabilities subcommand
description: The CLI must emit a valid §12.2 capabilities JSON document when invoked with capabilities

title: status --format json
description: The CLI must emit a valid §12.3 status JSON document when invoked with status --format json (no --zone) containing protocol, tool, version, healthy, connected, endpoint, details fields

title: convert --protocol RCP
description: The CLI must accept a relay.Status JSON on stdin and emit a relay.Message JSON on stdout when invoked with convert --protocol RCP; exit 1 on invalid input, exit 2 on wrong/missing --protocol
